prompt: Remove the GDK_DPI_SCALE session variable from hosts/classic-laddie/default.nix (the 3 lines: comment, the environment.sessionVariables.GDK_DPI_SCALE = "1.15"; line, and the blank line after it). Instead, set Hyprland's monitor scale for the Dell U4025QW. In home/hyprland.nix, change the DP-2 monitor line from scale 1 to scale 1.15: change "DP-2, highrr, auto, 1" to "DP-2, highrr, auto, 1.15". Keep the fallback monitor line at scale 1. Run any available tests before creating the PR.
